name: demoscript
description: Generate polished demo videos from any URL. Define scroll, zoom, highlight, and pan actions on page elements — renders MP4/GIF automatically via headless Chromium + FFmpeg.
author: Rudra Pratap Singh

scripts.build:action: cd github-action && npm install && npx ncc build src/main.ts -o dist --license licenses.txt
scripts.test: npx tsx --test tests/watch-mode.test.ts tests/multi-format.test.ts tests/github-action.test.ts tests/ai-generator.test.ts tests/cloud-client.test.ts tests/unit-coverage.test.ts tests/edge-cases.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npx tsx --test tests/watch-mode.test.ts tests/multi-format.test.ts tests/github-action.test.ts tests/ai-generator.test.ts tests/cloud-client.test.ts tests/unit-coverage.test.ts tests/edge-cases.test.ts tests/e2e.test.ts
